unexpected.title: Application error
unexpected.description: Something went wrong while rendering. You can reload or return home.

generic4xx.title: Client error
generic4xx.description: The server could not process this request. Check your input and try again.

generic5xx.title: Server error
generic5xx.description: A server error occurred. Try again later or contact your administrator.

400.title: Bad Request
400.description: The submitted data is invalid or incomplete. Check the form and try again.

401.title: Unauthorized
401.description: Your session expired or you are not signed in. Please sign in again.

402.title: Payment Required
402.description: This resource may require additional approval or permissions from an administrator.

403.title: Forbidden
403.description: Your account does not have permission for this action. Contact an administrator if you need access.

404.title: Not Found
404.description: The link may be expired or the address is wrong. Check the URL or return home.

405.title: Method Not Allowed
405.description: The API call or request uses a method the server does not support.

408.title: Request Timeout
408.description: The server waited too long for the request. Try again or check your plant network connection.

409.title: Conflict
409.description: Data state does not match what the server expected (e.g. concurrent edit). Refresh and try again.

410.title: Gone
410.description: This data or page is no longer available in the system.

413.title: Payload Too Large
413.description: The upload exceeds the server size limit. Reduce the file size or split the upload.

414.title: URI Too Long
414.description: The request URL is longer than the system allows. Reduce parameters or use search instead.

415.title: Unsupported Media Type
415.description: The content type or file extension is not allowed by the API.

422.title: Unprocessable Entity
422.description: The data format is valid but failed business rules or server validation.

423.title: Locked
423.description: This item is temporarily locked by another user or process.

429.title: Too Many Requests
429.description: API rate limit reached. Wait a moment and try again.

500.title: Internal Server Error
500.description: An unexpected server error occurred. Try again or report to an administrator with the time it happened.

501.title: Not Implemented
501.description: This feature or API route is not enabled on the server yet.

502.title: Bad Gateway
502.description: The proxy or gateway received an invalid response from the upstream server.

503.title: Service Unavailable
503.description: The server is under maintenance or temporarily overloaded. Try again later.

504.title: Gateway Timeout
504.description: The upstream server did not respond in time (often at the reverse proxy).
